offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate inventory predictions cause excess waste. We provide an inventory forecasting system instead of manual tracking and guesswork.
problem: Inaccurate inventory predictions leading to over-ordering and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Community forums for restaurant management tools
try_it: Let users try manual input for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminders for low stock alerts
Enable CSV import for existing inventory data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
